overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a blue futuristic sports car driving on a rain-soaked highway through Night City. The vehicle navigates through light traffic, passing under overhead signs indicating Westbrook, while the environment transitions from dense urban towers to open highway with mountainous terrain visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with overhead directional signs

events.description: ego vehicle changes lanes to overtake slower traffic on the left

agents.ego_description: piloting a blue futuristic sports car along the rain-slicked highway, weaving through light traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan being overtaken by the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large metal gantry spanning the road with directional arrows and 'WESTBROOK' signage
tall glass and steel tower with illuminated pink signage
grey concrete divider with yellow and black diagonal warning stripes
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked highway with a blue sports car driving beneath overhead signage. A futuristic glass skyscraper looms on the left while the vehicle maneuvers through sparse traffic, overtaking a silver sedan. The wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky and neon signs of the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve transitioning from urban to open terrain

events.description: vehicle navigates a gentle right curve on the highway
urban skyline recedes revealing fog-covered mountains in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive and overtake vehicles while the highway curves through changing terrain

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: hazy mountain range visible through the rain and fog
arid landscape with scrub vegetation alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway curves gently to the right as the dense urban architecture gives way to open landscape. Fog-covered mountains become visible in the distance while the vehicle continues overtaking traffic. The concrete barrier remains a constant presence on the right as arid terrain replaces the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with mountainous backdrop and industrial structures

events.description: overtaking a white van on the left side of the highway
vehicle continues at steady speed with open road ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open highway with minimal traffic, mountains visible in the foggy distance

notable_agents.action: black off-road vehicle driving ahead in the distance

entered.detail: distant buildings and towers scattered across the arid landscape
tall modern street lamp with illuminated fixture

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle cruising along an open stretch of highway with the urban environment far behind. Fog-covered mountains dominate the horizon while industrial structures dot the arid landscape to the right. The road ahead is clear with only a distant black vehicle visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked highway as a dense urban cityscape gradually transforms into an open, arid landscape. It begins with a blue sports car maneuvering through sparse traffic beneath overhead signage, passing a looming glass skyscraper while neon lights reflect off the wet asphalt. As the highway curves gently to the right, the towering architecture recedes and the environment opens up to reveal fog-covered mountains appearing in the distance. The scene then shifts further away from the city, replacing the urban skyline with arid terrain and scattered industrial structures along the roadside. Finally, the vehicle cruises along a clear stretch of road toward the distant mountains, leaving the city far behind under a persistent rain.
